mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_follower(id, user_id, follower_id, create_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{followerId}, #{createTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE follower_id = VALUES(follower_id), create_time = VALUES(create_time)
INSERT IGNORE INTO user_follower(id, user_id, follower_id, create_time) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{followerId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follower WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND follower_id = #{followerId}
